.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:500:This protocol defines the shared operating contract for Claude-Codex collaboration in this repository. It covers task handoff, shared state, event logging, artifact creation, lock usage, and completion signaling.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:511:- `tasks/`: task specifications and task handoff documents.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:543:  "active_agent": "none",
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:554:- `active_agent`: `claude`, `codex`, or `none`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:555:- `status`: compact workflow status such as `initialized`, `codex_ready`, `task_open`, `in_progress`, `blocked`, `needs_repair`, `completed`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:578:  "type": "codex_ready",
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:603:- `claude_ready`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:604:- `codex_ready`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:606:- `task_claimed`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:608:- `handoff_requested`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:609:- `review_requested`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:639:3. Check whether the task has an active owner. `claimed`, `in_progress`, `waiting`, `blocked`, and `timeout_candidate` are active ownership states for claim purposes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:641:5. If the task is open or recovered, append a `task_claimed` event while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:642:6. Update `state.json.active_agent`, `state.json.current_task`, `state.json.status`, and `state.json.last_event_id` while still holding `locks/journal.lock`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:720:Agents MUST NOT continue normal task claiming, handoff, or completion until the repair is complete.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:728:3. Append a `handoff_requested` event.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:730:5. State the handoff clearly in the user-facing response when applicable.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:744:- A `codex_ready` event in `events.jsonl`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:747:Claude readiness may be represented similarly with `claude_ready` and a corresponding readiness artifact.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:872:- `waiting_synthesis`: All independent analyses are complete. Waiting for designated agent to create synthesis.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:913:`protocol.md` 当前确实把 `codex_ready` 描述成 readiness signal，同时旧状态示例里还残留 `codex_ready` 作为 compact status；这正是本轮要消掉的语义混杂点。我再读取 review 协议，确认这次讨论是否有额外产物要求。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1461:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:1785:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:122:关键原因在 [collab_event.py](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py:92)：当前 `status_map.get(event_type, "in_progress")` 不只是给事件补字段，还会在 [line 112](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py:112) 无条件覆盖 `state.status`。这会让 `artifact_created`、`analysis_requested` 这类信息事件错误解除 `blocked`/`waiting` 等真实状态。现有日志我看到是 **52 条事件**，其中 7 个 `artifact_created` 都被写成了 `in_progress`，这已经证明默认值会污染状态历史。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1462:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:1786:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:127:- **方案 C：显式 allowlist** 方向正确，但单独不够。你给的 allowlist 会拒绝现有日志里的 `review_response`、`consensus_reached`、`state_corrected`、`collaboration_opened`、`skill_created`、`codex_ready`、`in_progress` 等类型，兼容性风险高；而且 allowlist 本身没有解决“哪些事件能改 state”的问题。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1469:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:1793:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:171:- `artifact_created`：表示产物已生成，不代表 blocker 解除、任务推进或等待交接。完成后如果要交接，另写 `handoff_requested`；如果解决 blocker，另写 `state_corrected` 或 `completed`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1650:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:2030:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:2470:    52	{"id": 52, "type": "review_response", "agent": "codex", "timestamp": "2026-05-30T15:03:01.295040+00:00", "summary": "Codex analyzed Gemini invocation/validation and modular agent registry proposals, recommending direct read-only Gemini workflow first and dynamic agents later behind conformance gates.", "task_id": "TASK-20260530-06", "artifacts": [".omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-2301-codex-gemini-and-modular-agent-analysis.md"], "status": "waiting", "details": {"recommendation": "prioritize fixed Claude/Codex/Gemini hardening before user-added dynamic agents", "gemini_interface": "direct CLI wrapper with manifest first; omc facade later", "dynamic_agents_priority": "P1/P2, not P0"}}
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1660:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:2041:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:2622:关键原因在 [collab_event.py](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py:92)：当前 `status_map.get(event_type, "in_progress")` 不只是给事件补字段，还会在 [line 112](/home/caohui/projects/graduation-leave-system/.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py:112) 无条件覆盖 `state.status`。这会让 `artifact_created`、`analysis_requested` 这类信息事件错误解除 `blocked`/`waiting` 等真实状态。现有日志我看到是 **52 条事件**，其中 7 个 `artifact_created` 都被写成了 `in_progress`，这已经证明默认值会污染状态历史。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1661:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:2042:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:2627:- **方案 C：显式 allowlist** 方向正确，但单独不够。你给的 allowlist 会拒绝现有日志里的 `review_response`、`consensus_reached`、`state_corrected`、`collaboration_opened`、`skill_created`、`codex_ready`、`in_progress` 等类型，兼容性风险高；而且 allowlist 本身没有解决“哪些事件能改 state”的问题。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-round-3-codex-5-1-status-override-events-2-legacy-can-2026-05-30T15-33-54-435Z.md:1668:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-1-d-codex-d-state-transitions-9-info-events-9-valueerro-2026-05-30T15-29-49-586Z.md:2049:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-phase-1a-task-1-collab-event-py-bug-bug-collab-event-py-102--2026-05-30T15-21-10-232Z.md:2671:- `artifact_created`：表示产物已生成，不代表 blocker 解除、任务推进或等待交接。完成后如果要交接，另写 `handoff_requested`；如果解决 blocker，另写 `state_corrected` 或 `completed`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3122:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:5406:+- Claude-Team upstream presents a hub-and-spoke model: Claude as the single user entry point, Codex for code implementation/debugging, Gemini for long-context repository/log/document analysis, and setup via MCP servers/templates.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3186:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7013:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3187:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7018:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3188:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7022:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3189:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7027:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3190:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7040:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3191:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7078:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3192:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7085:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3193:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7090:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3194:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7097:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3195:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7102:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3196:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7109:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3197:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7123:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3198:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7175:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3199:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7177:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3200:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7179:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3201:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7181:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3202:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7183:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3203:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7189:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3204:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7194:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3205:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7223:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3206:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7235:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3207:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7240:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3208:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7245:+- Gemini receives a prompt plus explicit file list or manifest.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3209:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7246:+- Gemini writes no repository files directly.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3210:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7249:+- Event types should be explicit: `analysis_requested`, `analysis_completed`, `analysis_failed`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3211:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7250:+- Failed Gemini calls must not move task state to generic `in_progress`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3212:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7258:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3213:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7266:+- `roles.md`: Claude/Codex/Gemini routing.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3214:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7269:+- `workflows/gemini-readonly.md`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3215:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7282:+- Gemini remains read-only unless the user explicitly authorizes write access and the work is isolated.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3216:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7327:+## Gemini CLI Considerations
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3217:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7329:+Gemini CLI is installed and versioned locally (`0.44.1`). That makes direct CLI feasible. The right first integration is not "Gemini as a third writer"; it is "Gemini as a large-context read-only analyst whose output is persisted as an artifact."

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3223:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7390:+- Existing local artifact `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/20260530-1654-codex-github-projects-analysis.md` already reached similar P0 conclusions: role routing, Gemini read-only artifact workflow, independent analysis protocol, journal validation, and defer full Ralph/MCP/global sync.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3230:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7466:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3231:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7471:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3232:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7475:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3233:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7480:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3234:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7493:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3235:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7531:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3236:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7538:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3237:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7543:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3238:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7550:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3239:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7555:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3240:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7562:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3241:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7576:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3242:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7628:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3243:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7630:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3244:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7632:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3245:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7634:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3246:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7636:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3247:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7642:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3248:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7647:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3249:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7676:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3250:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7688:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3251:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7693:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3255:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7703:+- Failed Gemini calls must not move task state to generic `in_progress`.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3256:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7711:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3276:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7934:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3277:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7938:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3278:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7943:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3279:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7956:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3280:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:7994:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3281:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8001:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3282:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8006:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3283:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8013:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3284:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8018:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3285:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8025:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3286:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8039:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3287:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8091:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3288:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8093:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3289:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8095:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3290:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8097:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3291:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8099:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3292:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8105:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3293:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8110:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3294:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8139:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3295:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8151:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3296:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8156:+gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3301:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8174:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3320:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8457:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3321:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8461:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3322:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8466:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3323:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8479:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3324:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8517:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3325:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8524:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3326:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8529:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3327:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8536:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3328:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8541:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3329:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8548:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3330:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8562:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3331:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8614:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3332:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8616:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3333:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8618:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3334:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8620:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3335:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8622:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3336:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8628:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3337:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8633:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3364:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8926:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3365:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8930:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. The local system already has the right foundation: event sourcing (`events.jsonl`), a rebuildable state cache (`state.json`), atomic journal locking, artifacts, and basic handoff semantics. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3366:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8935:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3367:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8948:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3368:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8986:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3369:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8993:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3370:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:8998:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3371:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9005:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3372:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9010:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3373:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9017:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3374:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9031:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3375:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9083:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3376:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9085:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3377:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9087:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3378:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9089:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3379:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9091:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3380:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9097:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3381:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9102:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3413:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9407:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3414:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9445:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3415:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9452:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3416:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9457:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3417:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9464:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3418:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9469:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3419:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9476:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3420:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9490:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3421:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9542:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3422:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9544:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3423:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9546:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3424:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9548:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3425:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9550:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3426:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9556:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3427:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9561:+2. Then add Gemini as a minimal read-only artifact producer.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3428:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9590:+Require `blocked`, `analysis_failed`, `validation_failed`, and `review_response` events to include:
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3429:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9602:+### P0. Gemini Read-Only Artifact Workflow

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3432:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9613:+- Gemini writes no repository files directly.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3435:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9625:+- `active_agent` must allow `gemini` where protocol says tri-model.

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3455:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9844:5. **Gemini CLI 已确认安装可用，版本 `0.44.1`**。建议 P0 以直接 CLI 的只读 artifact workflow 集成，不先做全局配置同步或 MCP。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3456:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9846:我没有简单接受 Claude 之前的优先级：Claude 旧方案把“跨平台 skill 分发”排得偏早；我的判断是它应降到 P2。当前更紧急的是强化状态语义、失败记忆和 Gemini 只读边界，否则三 agent 只会放大协作歧义。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3457:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9856:+# Codex Analysis: Four Collaboration Systems For Claude-Codex-Gemini-Collab
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3458:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9861:+**Local target:** `claude-codex-gemini-collab` skill and `.omc/collaboration` protocol
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3459:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9865:+The strongest improvement path is not to copy any one project. Its gaps are in enforcement, context budgeting, structured failure memory, and Gemini execution contract.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3460:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9870:+2. **P0:** Make Gemini a read-only artifact producer via direct CLI, because Gemini CLI is installed locally (`0.44.1`) and MCP is not required for the first useful workflow.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3461:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9883:+- Current skill project: `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3462:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9921:+Claude-Team is a hub-and-spoke model. Claude is the user-facing coordinator and invokes Codex/Gemini through MCP integrations. Codex is framed as implementation/debugging support; Gemini is framed as long-context analysis support.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3463:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9928:+- Installation-oriented templates: create/update Claude, Codex, and Gemini instruction files.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3464:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9933:+- Good default role mapping: Claude for orchestration, Codex for code, Gemini for large context.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3465:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9940:+- MCP setup modifies user-level tool configuration and adds installation risk. That is too much for the first Gemini integration step here.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3466:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9945:+- Borrow **advisor semantics**: Codex/Gemini suggestions are evidence, not authority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3467:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9952:+cc-use-exp is a configuration distribution and synchronization system, not a runtime collaboration engine. Its value is in how it separates rules, skills, commands, templates, and per-tool configuration for Claude, Gemini, Codex, Cursor, and related tools.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3468:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:9966:+- Its managed-block mindset is the right standard for any future `~/.codex`, `~/.gemini`, or `~/.claude` writes.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3469:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10018:+3. **Protocol loading is too monolithic.** Agents read the whole protocol even when they only need "how to claim" or "how to run Gemini read-only." This burns context and increases accidental instruction collisions.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3470:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10020:+4. **Gemini support is present but not yet disciplined.** Gemini CLI is installed and an invocation script exists, but the workflow still needs a stronger contract: input manifest, read-only guarantee, artifact output, event type, failure artifact, and validation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3471:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10022:+5. **Flat peer collaboration lacks routing pressure.** The protocol defines roles, but task creation/claim/handoff scripts do not force route choice or explain why a task should go to Claude, Codex, or Gemini.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3472:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10024:+6. **The skill project is not a complete plugin distribution.** `/home/caohui/projects/claude-codex-gemini-collab` has `SKILL.md`, assets, and scripts, but no `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`. Treating marketplace/plugin distribution as P0 would be premature.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3473:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10026:+7. **Current scripts have correctness gaps.** The skill template says `active_agent` is `claude`, `codex`, or `none`, despite Gemini support. `collab_event.py` sets unknown event types to `in_progress`, which can corrupt state for analysis-only events. `repair()` writes state directly instead of using the journal lock/atomic temp contract. These need hardening before expanding automation.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3474:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10032:+Claude's earlier priority list treated "Gemini integration" and "cross-platform skill distribution" as the highest ROI. I agree with Gemini, but not with broad distribution as an early priority.
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3475:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-4-claude-codex-gemini-collab-1-dev-buddy-plugin-vcp-ralph-lo-2026-05-30T14-54-28-940Z.md:10037:+2. .omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:3751:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:3353:> 上图展示从 `gemini` 命令输入到 Gemini 3 模型输出的完整链路：① `GEMINI.md` 分层拼接（Global → Project → 子目录 JIT），通过 `@import` 注入 cc-use-exp 的 5 个 rules 文件；② Agent Skills（v0.24+）调用 `activate_skill` 工具弹确认后加载完整 SKILL.md；③ TOML Commands（如 `/layout`）和 Extensions（context7、chrome-devtools-mcp）显式介入。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4063:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6501:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4064:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6505:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4072:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6553:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4073:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6554:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4076:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6561:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4078:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6564:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4080:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6569:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4083:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6575:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4097:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6612:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4099:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6618:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4100:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6619:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4103:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6634:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
