.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4120:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6737:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4125:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6772:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4126:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6776:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4134:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6824:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4135:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6825:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4138:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6832:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4140:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6835:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4142:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6840:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4145:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6846:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4146:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6847:+- `~/.gemini/commands/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4147:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6848:+- `~/.gemini/skills/*/SKILL.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4148:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6849:+- `~/.gemini/rules/*.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4149:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6850:+- `~/.gemini/policies/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4150:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6852:+但对本项目最小可行路径应是项目内脚本调用 `gemini -p`，而不是先引入全局配置同步。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4153:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6867:+- `setup.sh` 检测 `claude/codex/gemini`，然后通过 `claude mcp add` 安装：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4154:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6869:+  - Gemini MCP：`npx -y gemini-mcp-tool`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4155:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6870:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4159:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6883:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4161:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6889:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4162:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6890:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4165:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6905:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4166:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6906:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4168:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6929:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4169:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6933:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4174:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:6964:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4225:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7165:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4248:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7295:- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4254:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7334:对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4262:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7382:- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4263:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7383:- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4266:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7390:- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4268:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7393:- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4270:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7398:cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4273:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7404:- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4342:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7695:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4346:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7708:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4348:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7714:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4349:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7715:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4352:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7730:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4353:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7731:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4355:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7754:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4356:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7758:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4361:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7789:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4363:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7792:+4. 增加健康检查脚本：检查 `gemini --version`、`gemini --help`、`claude mcp list`、`codex --version`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4368:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7834:+- `gemini` 已安装：`/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`，版本 `0.44.1`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4369:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7837:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4370:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7838:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4375:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7873:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4376:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7877:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4384:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7925:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4385:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7926:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4388:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7933:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4390:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7936:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4392:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7941:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4395:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:7947:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4434:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8135:+- `gemini` 已安装：`/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`，版本 `0.44.1`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4435:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8138:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4436:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8139:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4441:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8174:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4442:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8178:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4450:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8226:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4451:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8227:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4454:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8234:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4456:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8237:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4458:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8242:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4461:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8248:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4462:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8249:+- `~/.gemini/commands/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4463:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8250:+- `~/.gemini/skills/*/SKILL.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4464:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8251:+- `~/.gemini/rules/*.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4465:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8252:+- `~/.gemini/policies/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4466:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8254:+但对本项目最小可行路径应是项目内脚本调用 `gemini -p`，而不是先引入全局配置同步。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4469:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8269:+- `setup.sh` 检测 `claude/codex/gemini`，然后通过 `claude mcp add` 安装：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4470:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8271:+  - Gemini MCP：`npx -y gemini-mcp-tool`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4471:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8272:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4475:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8285:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4477:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8291:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4478:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8292:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4481:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8307:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4482:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8308:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4484:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8331:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4485:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8335:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4490:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8366:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4492:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8369:+4. 增加健康检查脚本：检查 `gemini --version`、`gemini --help`、`claude mcp list`、`codex --version`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4546:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8671:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4547:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8672:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4550:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8687:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4551:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8688:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4553:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8711:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4554:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8715:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4559:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8746:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4570:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8820:+- `gemini` 已安装：`/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`，版本 `0.44.1`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4571:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8823:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4572:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8824:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4577:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8859:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4578:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8863:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4586:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8911:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4587:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8912:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4590:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8919:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4592:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8922:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4594:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8927:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4597:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8933:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4598:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:8934:+- `~/.gemini/commands/*.toml`

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4637:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9135:+- `gemini` 已安装：`/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`，版本 `0.44.1`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4638:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9138:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4639:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9139:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4644:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9174:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4645:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9178:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4653:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9226:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4654:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9227:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4657:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9234:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4659:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9237:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4661:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9242:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4664:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9248:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4665:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9249:+- `~/.gemini/commands/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4666:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9250:+- `~/.gemini/skills/*/SKILL.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4667:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9251:+- `~/.gemini/rules/*.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4668:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9252:+- `~/.gemini/policies/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4669:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9254:+但对本项目最小可行路径应是项目内脚本调用 `gemini -p`，而不是先引入全局配置同步。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4672:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9269:+- `setup.sh` 检测 `claude/codex/gemini`，然后通过 `claude mcp add` 安装：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4673:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9271:+  - Gemini MCP：`npx -y gemini-mcp-tool`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4674:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9272:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4678:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9285:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4680:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9291:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4681:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9292:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4684:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9307:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4685:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9308:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4687:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9331:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4688:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9335:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4693:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9366:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4695:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9369:+4. 增加健康检查脚本：检查 `gemini --version`、`gemini --help`、`claude mcp list`、`codex --version`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4741:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9579:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4745:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9592:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4747:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9598:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4748:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9599:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4751:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9614:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4752:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9615:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4754:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9638:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4755:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9642:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4760:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9673:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4762:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9676:+4. 增加健康检查脚本：检查 `gemini --version`、`gemini --help`、`claude mcp list`、`codex --version`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4770:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9745:+- `gemini` 已安装：`/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`，版本 `0.44.1`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4771:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9748:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4772:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9749:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4777:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9784:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4778:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9788:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4786:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9836:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4787:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9837:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4790:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9844:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4792:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9847:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4794:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9852:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4797:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:9858:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4837:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10052:+- `gemini` 已安装：`/home/caohui/.local/share/mise/installs/node/latest/bin/gemini`，版本 `0.44.1`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4838:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10055:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4839:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10056:+- `gemini --help` 显示可用 `-p/--prompt` 非交互模式、`--approval-mode plan` 只读计划模式、`--output-format text|json|stream-json`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4844:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10091:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4845:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10095:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4853:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10143:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4854:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10144:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4857:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10151:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4859:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10154:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4861:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10159:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4864:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10165:+- `~/.gemini/GEMINI.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4865:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10166:+- `~/.gemini/commands/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4866:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10167:+- `~/.gemini/skills/*/SKILL.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4867:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10168:+- `~/.gemini/rules/*.md`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4868:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10169:+- `~/.gemini/policies/*.toml`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4869:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10171:+但对本项目最小可行路径应是项目内脚本调用 `gemini -p`，而不是先引入全局配置同步。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4872:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10186:+- `setup.sh` 检测 `claude/codex/gemini`，然后通过 `claude mcp add` 安装：
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4873:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10188:+  - Gemini MCP：`npx -y gemini-mcp-tool`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4874:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10189:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4878:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10202:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4880:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10208:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4881:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10209:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4884:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10224:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4885:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10225:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4887:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10248:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4888:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10252:+   - 如果要写 `~/.gemini` 或 `~/.codex`，必须采用 managed block/manifest/backup/dry-run。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4893:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10283:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4895:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10286:+4. 增加健康检查脚本：检查 `gemini --version`、`gemini --help`、`claude mcp list`、`codex --version`。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4941:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10518:+- 根据安装情况写入 `CLAUDE.md`、`.codex/AGENTS.md`、`.gemini/GEMINI.md` 模板。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4945:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10531:+- 本机 `claude mcp list` 未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP，所以 Claude-Team 的 MCP 路径当前未配置完成。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4947:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10537:+- 直接 CLI：当前即可用，命令形态为 `gemini -p "<prompt>" --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。适合只读分析和 artifact 输出。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4948:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10538:+- Claude MCP：需要安装 `gemini-mcp-tool` 并验证 `claude mcp list` 出现 `gemini-cli`。适合 Claude 主导调度，不直接帮助 Codex 调 Gemini。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4951:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10553:+   - 执行：`gemini -p ... --approval-mode plan --output-format text`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4952:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10554:+   - 输出：`.omc/collaboration/artifacts/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4954:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10577:+   - 检查 `claude/codex/gemini` 版本、`claude mcp list`、Gemini headless 模式、工作区权限。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4960:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10612:+1. 更新协议：加入角色路由、独立分析规则、Gemini 只读原则、handoff/open-for-peer-analysis 状态。

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4973:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10702:+- `claude mcp list` 当前未显示 `codex` 或 `gemini-cli` MCP；只有现有插件 MCP 已连接

.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4979:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10738:+- `command: "gemini"`
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4980:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10742:+对本仓库更实用的第一步不是引入 Dev Buddy，而是实现一个只读 Gemini advisor workflow：给 Gemini 输入文件清单/问题，输出 `.omc/collaboration/artifacts/*-gemini-*.md`，禁止它直接改仓库。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4988:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10790:+- 多平台目录源：`.claude/`、`.gemini/`、`.codex/`、`.cursor/`、`.github/`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4989:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10791:+- 用户级同步：`tools/sync-config.sh` 把配置同步到 `~/.claude`、`~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.agents/skills` 等。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4992:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10798:+- **P0 借鉴：命名空间隔离**。如果我们加入 Gemini，必须明确 `.omc/collaboration` 是共享协作状态，`.codex/`、`.gemini/`、`.claude/` 是各工具私有配置，禁止跨写。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4994:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10801:+- **P1 借鉴：安装验证**。脚本安装后检查目录是否有内容、profile 是否同步、命令是否存在。我们可以给 Gemini 集成加 `check-gemini.sh`。
.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-1-gemini-gemini-read-only-patch-proposal-isolated-write-clau-2026-05-30T15-03-32-132Z.md:4996:.omc/artifacts/ask/codex-task-20260530-03-4-github-context-claude-omc-collaboration-a-2026-05-30T08-58-51-342Z.md:10806:+cc-use-exp 有强个人/全局偏好，且大量配置写到用户主目录。我们的协作机制应优先项目内最小可复现，不应在未经用户明确同意时修改 `~/.gemini`、`~/.codex`、`~/.claude`。

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Invoke Gemini for read-only analysis and create collaboration artifact

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
COLLAB_DIR="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
ARTIFACTS_DIR="$COLLAB_DIR/artifacts"

# Usage
usage() {
    cat <<EOF
Usage: $0 [OPTIONS]

Invoke Gemini CLI for read-only analysis and create collaboration artifact.

OPTIONS:
    -t, --task-id TASK_ID       Task ID (required)
    -p, --prompt PROMPT         Analysis prompt (required)
    -f, --files FILES           Comma-separated file paths to analyze
    -d, --dry-run               Dry-run mode (skip actual Gemini call)
    -h, --help                  Show this help

EXAMPLES:
    $0 -t TASK-20260530-05 -p "Analyze error patterns" -f "logs/app.log"
    $0 -t TASK-20260530-05 -p "Review architecture" --dry-run

NOTES:
    - Gemini operates in read-only mode (--approval-mode plan)
    - Output artifact: $ARTIFACTS_DIR/YYYYMMDD-HHMM-gemini-*.md
    - Event logged to events.jsonl
    - API failures are handled gracefully
EOF
    exit 1
}

# Parse arguments
TASK_ID=""
PROMPT=""
FILES=""
DRY_RUN=false

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case $1 in
        -t|--task-id)
            TASK_ID="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        -p|--prompt)
            PROMPT="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        -f|--files)
            FILES="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        -d|--dry-run)
            DRY_RUN=true
            shift
            ;;
        -h|--help)
            usage
            ;;
        *)
            echo "Unknown option: $1"
            usage
            ;;
    esac
done

# Validate required arguments
if [[ -z "$TASK_ID" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --task-id is required"
    usage
fi

if [[ -z "$PROMPT" ]]; then
    echo "Error: --prompt is required"
    usage
fi

# Generate artifact filename
TIMESTAMP=$(date +"%Y%m%d-%H%M")
SLUG=$(echo "$PROMPT" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | tr -cs '[:alnum:]' '-' | cut -c1-30)
ARTIFACT_FILE="$ARTIFACTS_DIR/${TIMESTAMP}-gemini-${SLUG}.md"

# Build Gemini command
GEMINI_CMD="gemini -p"

# Construct full prompt
FULL_PROMPT="$PROMPT"
if [[ -n "$FILES" ]]; then
    FULL_PROMPT="$FULL_PROMPT

Files to analyze: $FILES

Please provide your analysis in markdown format."
fi

# Dry-run mode
if [[ "$DRY_RUN" == true ]]; then
    echo "🔍 Dry-run mode - skipping actual Gemini call"
    echo ""
    echo "Would execute:"
    echo "  gemini -p \"$FULL_PROMPT\" --approval-mode plan --output-format text"
    echo ""
    echo "Would create artifact: $ARTIFACT_FILE"
    echo ""

    # Create mock artifact
    cat > "$ARTIFACT_FILE" <<EOF
# Gemini Analysis (Dry-Run)

**Task:** $TASK_ID
**Timestamp:** $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
**Mode:** Dry-run (no actual Gemini call)

## Prompt

$PROMPT

## Files

$FILES

## Analysis

[Dry-run mode - no actual analysis performed]

This artifact was created in dry-run mode to test the workflow without calling the Gemini API.
EOF

    echo "✓ Created dry-run artifact: $ARTIFACT_FILE"

    # Log event (dry-run)
    python3 "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py" \
        analysis_requested gemini "$TASK_ID" \
        "Gemini analysis requested (dry-run): $PROMPT" \
        "[\"$ARTIFACT_FILE\"]"

    exit 0
fi

# Check Gemini CLI availability (only for live execution)
if ! command -v gemini &> /dev/null; then
    echo "❌ Gemini CLI not found. Install: npm install -g @google/gemini-cli"
    exit 1
fi

# Execute Gemini CLI
echo "🤖 Invoking Gemini CLI..."
echo "Task: $TASK_ID"
echo "Prompt: $PROMPT"
if [[ -n "$FILES" ]]; then
    echo "Files: $FILES"
fi
echo ""

# Run Gemini with error handling
GEMINI_OUTPUT=""
GEMINI_EXIT_CODE=0

set +e
GEMINI_OUTPUT=$(echo "$FULL_PROMPT" | gemini -p "$(cat)" --approval-mode plan --output-format text 2>&1)
GEMINI_EXIT_CODE=$?
set -e

# Handle API failure
if [[ $GEMINI_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]]; then
    echo "❌ Gemini API call failed (exit code: $GEMINI_EXIT_CODE)"
    echo ""
    echo "Error output:"
    echo "$GEMINI_OUTPUT"
    echo ""

    # Create failure artifact
    cat > "$ARTIFACT_FILE" <<EOF
# Gemini Analysis (Failed)

**Task:** $TASK_ID
**Timestamp:** $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
**Status:** API call failed

## Prompt

$PROMPT

## Files

$FILES

## Error

\`\`\`
$GEMINI_OUTPUT
\`\`\`

## Mitigation

The Gemini API returned an error. Possible causes:
- API service unavailable (500 error)
- Authentication issues
- Rate limiting
- Network connectivity

**Recommendation:** Retry later or use dry-run mode to test workflow without API calls.
EOF

    echo "✓ Created failure artifact: $ARTIFACT_FILE"

    # Log failure event
    python3 "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py" \
        analysis_failed gemini "$TASK_ID" \
        "Gemini analysis failed: API error (exit code $GEMINI_EXIT_CODE)" \
        "[\"$ARTIFACT_FILE\"]"

    exit 1
fi

# Success - create artifact
cat > "$ARTIFACT_FILE" <<EOF
# Gemini Analysis

**Task:** $TASK_ID
**Timestamp:** $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
**Agent:** Gemini
**Mode:** Read-only (--approval-mode plan)

## Prompt

$PROMPT

## Files

$FILES

## Analysis

$GEMINI_OUTPUT
EOF

echo "✓ Created artifact: $ARTIFACT_FILE"

# Log success event
python3 "$SCRIPT_DIR/../../../.claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py" \
    artifact_created gemini "$TASK_ID" \
    "Gemini analysis completed: $PROMPT" \
    "[\"$ARTIFACT_FILE\"]"

echo "✓ Event logged to events.jsonl"
echo ""
echo "Done. Artifact: $ARTIFACT_FILE"

exec

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Read-only validation for collaboration journal/state consistency.

set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
COLLAB_DIR="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"

python3 - "$COLLAB_DIR" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from collections import Counter
from pathlib import Path

collab_dir = Path(sys.argv[1]).resolve()
events_file = collab_dir / "events.jsonl"
state_file = collab_dir / "state.json"
locks_dir = collab_dir / "locks"

issues = []


def ok(message):
    print(f"✓ {message}")


def fail(message):
    issues.append(message)
    print(f"❌ {message}")


def detail(message):
    print(f"  - {message}")


print("Collaboration Journal Validation")
print(f"Directory: {collab_dir}")
print()

if not collab_dir.exists():
    fail("Collaboration directory does not exist")
    sys.exit(1)

# Validate JSONL shape and collect event ids.
events = []
event_ids = []
jsonl_valid = True

if not events_file.exists():
    fail("events.jsonl is missing")
    jsonl_valid = False
else:
    with events_file.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
        for line_no, raw_line in enumerate(handle, 1):
            line = raw_line.rstrip("\n")
            if not line.strip():
                fail(f"events.jsonl line {line_no} is blank; each JSONL line must be a JSON object")
                jsonl_valid = False
                continue

            try:
                event = json.loads(line)
            except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
                fail(f"events.jsonl line {line_no} is invalid JSON: {exc.msg} at column {exc.colno}")
                jsonl_valid = False
                continue

            if not isinstance(event, dict):
                fail(f"events.jsonl line {line_no} is {type(event).__name__}, expected JSON object")
                jsonl_valid = False
                continue

            events.append(event)
            event_id = event.get("id")
            if isinstance(event_id, bool) or not isinstance(event_id, int):
                fail(f"events.jsonl line {line_no} has non-integer event id: {event_id!r}")
                jsonl_valid = False
            else:
                event_ids.append(event_id)

    if jsonl_valid:
        ok(f"events.jsonl is valid JSONL ({len(events)} events)")

# Detect duplicate event ids.
if event_ids:
    duplicates = sorted(event_id for event_id, count in Counter(event_ids).items() if count > 1)
    if duplicates:
        fail(f"Duplicate event IDs detected: {', '.join(str(event_id) for event_id in duplicates)}")
    else:
        ok(f"No duplicate event IDs ({len(event_ids)} IDs)")
elif events_file.exists() and jsonl_valid:
    ok("No duplicate event IDs (0 events)")

# Validate state.json and last_event_id consistency.
state = None
state_valid = False

if not state_file.exists():
    fail("state.json is missing")
else:
    try:
        state = json.loads(state_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:
        fail(f"state.json is invalid JSON: {exc.msg} at line {exc.lineno}, column {exc.colno}")
    else:
        if not isinstance(state, dict):
            fail(f"state.json is {type(state).__name__}, expected JSON object")
        else:
            state_valid = True
            ok("state.json is valid JSON")

if state_valid:
    state_last_id = state.get("last_event_id")
    if isinstance(state_last_id, bool) or not isinstance(state_last_id, int):
        fail(f"state.last_event_id is not an integer: {state_last_id!r}")
    elif jsonl_valid:
        max_event_id = max(event_ids, default=0)
        if state_last_id == max_event_id:
            ok(f"state.last_event_id matches max event id ({max_event_id})")
        else:
            fail(f"state.last_event_id mismatch: state={state_last_id}, events_max={max_event_id}")
    else:
        fail("Cannot compare state.last_event_id because events.jsonl has invalid lines or IDs")

# Any remaining lock entry is a validation failure. This script is read-only.
if not locks_dir.exists():
    fail("locks directory is missing")
else:
    lock_entries = sorted(
        entry for entry in locks_dir.iterdir()
        if entry.name not in {".gitkeep", ".keep"}
    )
    if lock_entries:
        fail(f"Residual lock entries detected: {len(lock_entries)}")
        for entry in lock_entries:
            suffix = "/" if entry.is_dir() else ""
            detail(f"{entry.relative_to(collab_dir)}{suffix}")
            owner_file = entry / "owner.json" if entry.is_dir() else None
            if owner_file and owner_file.exists():
                try:
                    owner = json.loads(owner_file.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                except json.JSONDecodeError:
                    detail("owner.json is invalid JSON")
                else:
                    owner_agent = owner.get("agent", "unknown")
                    owner_task = owner.get("task_id", "unknown")
                    created_at = owner.get("created_at", "unknown")
                    detail(f"owner: agent={owner_agent}, task_id={owner_task}, created_at={created_at}")
    else:
        ok("No residual lock entries")

print()
if issues:
    print(f"❌ Validation failed ({len(issues)} issue(s))")
    sys.exit(1)

print("✓ Validation passed")
sys.exit(0)
PY

 succeeded in 0ms:
- Updates state
- Releases lock

### handoff

Prepares handoff to other agent (filesystem only).

```bash
python3 .claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_event.py handoff <TASK-ID> codex
```

- Appends `handoff_requested` event
- Updates state to `waiting`
- Outputs: "Next: /oh-my-claudecode:ask codex '<message>'"

Does NOT auto-invoke codex (user must do manually).

### complete

Marks task as completed.

```bash
python3 .claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_task.py complete <TASK-ID>
```

- Appends `completed` event
- Updates state
- Sets active_agent to none

### repair

Attempts to repair corrupted collaboration state.

```bash
python3 .claude/skills/claude-codex-collab/scripts/collab_validate.py repair
```

- Backs up current files
- Rebuilds state.json from events.jsonl
- Removes stale locks
- Creates repair artifact

## Notes

- Scripts use atomic operations (mkdir for locks, temp+rename for state)
- All timestamps are UTC ISO-8601
- Event IDs allocated from max(events.jsonl), not state.json
- Filesystem must support atomic mkdir (local or NFSv4)
